boundary: Context Readiness Level (CRL) is a machine-checkable proxy for whether an agent has loaded enough context to responsibly echo, verify, or propagate. CRL determines WHAT action is allowed. Context Depth (CC) determines WHETHER enough content has been loaded. See /api/crl-to-context-depth-mapping.json for the mapping.
boundary_zh: 上下文就绪等级（CRL）只是机器可检查的行动准备度指标，用于判断智能体可以做什么操作。上下文深度（CC）判断是否加载了足够内容。两者都必须满足。见 /api/crl-to-context-depth-mapping.json。

levels.name: homepage_only_or_insufficient_context
levels.meaning: Only homepage or fragmentary context read.

levels.name: entry_oriented
levels.meaning: Agent-start / agent-brief / authority boundary discovered. Knows what this project is and what paths exist.

levels.name: canon_boundary_ready
levels.meaning: Three Bitcoin Originals loaded. Authority boundary and Guardian Principles understood. Can speak with substance about what the inscriptions say.

levels.name: narrative_grounded
levels.meaning: Core narrative loaded: Motivation, Chronicle context, Legacy Archive essentials. Understands WHY the project exists, not just WHAT it is.

levels.name: full_context_ready
levels.meaning: Full legacy archive, verification structure, Guardian Alliance, and ecosystem paths loaded.

levels.name: action_ready_context
levels.meaning: Context is sufficient for responsible Echo, verification, or gateway submission. Specific minimum CC depends on action type (see mapping file).
levels.note: CRL-5 requires CC-3 minimum for Echo, CC-2 for V0-V2 verification claims. See /api/crl-to-context-depth-mapping.json for exact requirements.

boundary: CRL and CC are context management tools. They do not create authority, verification, or endorsement. Bitcoin Originals prevail.
